Sign in Request Demo

Your Brand. Autonomously Engaged. At Scale.

GLUCOSE deploys AI Experience Agents that represent your brand, know your products, and engage every customer — across every channel, in every language, 24/7.

Explore GLUCOSE
99.99% Accuracy
+30 Pts CSAT
97% Faster Resolution
SOC2 & ISO 27001 certified
The Shift

AI is becoming the interface. If you don't deploy your own agent, someone else will represent your brand.

Legacy

CRM is reactive

Traditional CRM stores records and triggers workflows — it cannot adapt in real time to non-linear customer journeys.

Current

Chatbots are scripted

Rule-based bots follow decision trees. They break on complexity, can't handle multi-intent requests, and frustrate customers.

Future

Agentic AI is autonomous

Goal-driven AI agents reason, adapt, and act — representing your brand across the entire customer lifecycle without scripts.

GLUCOSE gives brands their own autonomous AI Experience Agents
What is GLUCOSE

Customer engagement that runs itself.

Your brand. Always running on GLUCOSE.

Imagine your brand showing up for every customer—answering, guiding, engaging—autonomously. That's GLUCOSE.

AI Experience Agents

You define goal-driven AI Experience Agents that know your products, speak your brand, and follow your rules. GLUCOSE orchestrates them across every touchpoint, every channel, every language. No scripts. No queues. No overhead.

Unlock Unparalleled Engagement

GLUCOSE is an intuitive and reliable Agentic AI designed for brands to enhance, introduce, explain, demonstrate, and personalize product-specific features and experiences—autonomously across every touchpoint.

Control the Product Experience

GLUCOSE offers an unprecedented opportunity for Brands to engage with captive users and control the Product Experience across all stages of the Customer and Product Lifecycles.

Learn more
How do I activate cruise control?
I'd be happy to help you with cruise control! On your RAV4, the controls are on the right side of your steering wheel.
First, press the ON/OFF button to activate the system. You'll see an indicator on your dashboard.
Got it, thanks!
Live Product Demo

Watch GLUCOSE handle real customer conversations

See how GLUCOSE turns intent into action with autonomous guidance, multimodal understanding, and seamless conversion journeys across messaging channels.

Watch More Demos Request Demo

Automotive Demo

Sales Opportunity Signal: Test Drive Booking
Why It Matters

AI Experience Agents for Brand & Product Experiences

AI Experience Agents

Create exceptional brand and product experiences with autonomous AI agents that engage every customer—personally and contextually across every channel.

Own Your Brand Representation

AI is becoming the interface. GLUCOSE gives you full control over how your brand is represented—your voice, your rules, your customer relationships.

Safety, Guardrails & Eval

Enterprise-grade trust built in. Automated testing, real-time evaluation, compliance guardrails, and full auditability—so your AI always stays on brand and on policy.

Insights & Analytics

Every conversation is data. Not surveys, not inferred behavior—actual customer intent, unfiltered, from real interactions. Insights you can't get anywhere else.

GLUCOSE AGENTIC AI

Your playbook.
Autonomously executed.

AI agents that follow your SOPs, connect to your systems, and handle complex customer interactions—with precision, enterprise-wide.

Deploy Across Every Channel
WhatsAppTelegramLineMessengerViberWebVoice
GLUCOSE AI
Listening...

User (voice): My car is making a strange noise when I brake

GLUCOSE AI: I understand you're hearing a noise during braking. Can you describe it — is it a squealing, grinding, or clicking sound?

User (voice): It's more like a grinding sound

GLUCOSE AI: Grinding during braking typically indicates worn brake pads. I recommend having this checked soon. Would you like me to book a service appointment?

Voice

GLUCOSE

G
GLUCOSE AI
I just got my new smartwatch, how do I set it up?
Congratulations! I'll guide you through setup. First, make sure your watch is charged to at least 50%.
Then download the companion app from the App Store and enable Bluetooth on your phone.
Done! What's next?
Step 3 of 5
Now hold your phone near the watch. You should see a pairing prompt appear...

Our Customers

The results speak for themselves

GLUCOSE is trusted by leading brands across industries to transform customer engagement.

"GLUCOSE transformed how we engage with customers post-purchase. The AI understands our bikes better than most humans—and it speaks our brand voice perfectly. Our customers get instant, accurate answers about everything from maintenance to accessories."
CEO
RUFF CYCLES
"The platform's ability to understand context and deliver personalized responses transformed customer support operations. It's like having a team of experts available 24/7."
Gennady K.
CEO, Technology Services
"GLUCOSE changed how we think about customer engagement. The AI doesn't just respond—it understands our products and brand voice perfectly."
Product Head
Lifestyle Mobility
"We've seen a dramatic improvement in response quality and customer satisfaction since implementing GLUCOSE. The autonomous agents handle complex queries with ease."
Tech Lead
Enterprise Software
"The platform handles everything from warranty inquiries to service bookings autonomously. Our customers get instant, accurate responses around the clock."
Service Manager
Automotive
"Patient engagement has never been easier. The AI understands medical context and provides appropriate guidance while maintaining compliance."
Digital Health Director
Healthcare
"Our customers receive personalized financial guidance instantly. The compliance guardrails give us confidence to scale without risk."
VP Customer Experience
Financial Services
"Post-purchase support is now a competitive advantage. Customers love getting instant help with setup and troubleshooting."
Product Manager
Consumer Electronics
"We reduced support costs by 40% while improving CSAT scores. The AI handles routine queries so our team can focus on complex issues."
CX Operations Lead
Telecommunications
"Subscriber engagement increased significantly. The AI recommends content and handles account queries with our brand's personality."
Head of Growth
Media & Entertainment
